data.title: Kornit Digital Sets First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Webcast
data.description: In Rosh-Ha'Ayin, Israel, on April 29, 2026, Kornit Digital Ltd. (Nasdaq: KRNT), a prominent player in sustainable digital fashion and textile production, revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for Q1 2026 on Wednesday, May 13. The announcement regarding the results release was made ahead of the market opening on that day.

data.title: Hayward Holdings Reports First Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results and Increases Guidance
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - Hayward Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: HAYW), a global company specializing in water management, particularly in pool and outdoor living technology as well as industrial flow control products, has released their financial report for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026, which concluded on March 28, 2026. The figures presented in this report are in comparison to the financial results from the same period in the previous year. The CEO of Hayward expressed satisfaction with the outcomes.

data.title: Hightouch Raises $150 Million to Reinvent How Marketing Works Using AI
data.description: In San Francisco, Hightouch, a prominent company specializing in data and AI for marketing, revealed securing a substantial funding of $150 million in a Series D financing round. The financing was spearheaded by Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives and Bain Capital Ventures, leading to an impressive company valuation of $2.75 billion. Notable participation also came from additional investors and strategic partners including Iconiq Capital, Sapphire Ventures, Amplify Partners, Y-Combinator, and TD7 - The Trade Desk's venture capital arm. Hightouch has demonstrated remarkable growth, exceeding 100% in each period.

data.title: Tradeweb Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Tradeweb Markets Inc. announced its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, with a total revenue of $617.8 million, marking a 21.2% increase (17.5% in constant currency) from the same period last year. The international revenue for the quarter reached $274.1 million, demonstrating a 29.4% surge (20.7% in constant currency) compared to the prior year. The company also reported an average daily volume ("ADV") of $3.3 trillion during this period. Tradeweb Markets Inc. is a leading global electronic trading firm operating across various asset classes.

data.title: Visa Accelerates Stablecoin Momentum: Adding Five Blockchains for Settlement
data.description: Visa (NYSE: V) disclosed today in San Francisco that it is broadening its global stablecoin settlement pilot by incorporating five new blockchains. This move aims to enhance settlement options for issuers and acquirers within the network. With the integration of these new blockchains, Visa's stablecoin settlement pilot now encompasses nine blockchains. The initiative has achieved a remarkable milestone of a $7 billion annualized stablecoin settlement run rate, marking a substantial 50% increase from the previous quarter. The growth in settlement volume emphasizes the progressive integration of stablecoins into mainstream payment ecosystems. Visa's expanding reach highlights a shift towards a multi-chain operational landscape to meet the evolving demands of its partners.

data.title: Visa Announces Global Expansion of Agentic Ready Program
data.description: Visa Inc. announced the extension of its global Agentic Ready initiative to clients in Asia Pacific and Latin America. The program, initially rolled out in Europe, including the UK, has been expanded to support the payments industry in preparation for agent-led commerce. As the future of commerce evolves, AI agents are transitioning from providing answers to actively engaging in tasks like searching and decision-making. Visa continues to advance this initiative to adapt to the changing landscape of commerce.

data.title: D-Wave to Host First-Ever Investor Day at the New York Stock Exchange
data.description: D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS) based in Palo Alto, California, will hold its inaugural Investor Day on June 1, 2026, at the New York Stock Exchange and online. The event, titled "The D-Wave Difference," aims to showcase the company's unique position as the sole provider of both annealing and gate-model quantum computing systems, software, and services. Investors will gain insights into D-Wave's technological advancements, product plans, and future direction during the event.

data.title: KOHO Launches Crypto Offering Powered by Ndax, Bringing Low-Cost, Regulated Trading to Canadians
data.description: In Toronto, KOHO has introduced KOHO Crypto, a new service aiming to provide Canadians with easy, safe, and cost-effective exposure to digital assets in their daily financial activities. This offering is integrated into the KOHO app, which is utilized by over 2.5 million Canadians for various financial purposes including spending, saving, and credit building. With KOHO Crypto, users can purchase, retain, and oversee crypto assets within the same app they already use for money management. This feature is made possible through a partnership with Ndax, a reputable digital asset exchange platform in Canada.

data.title: Nikon Begins Commercial Deployment of its Next-Generation APDIS MV5X Laser Radar System Powered by Aeva
data.description: In Mountain View, California and Brighton, Michigan, a collaboration between Aeva® (Nasdaq: AEVA) and Nikon Metrology, LLC has led to the development of advanced sensing and perception systems. Aeva's Eve high-precision sensor technology is now integrated into Nikon Corporation's latest APDIS MV5X Laser Radar system. This system marks the beginning of its commercial utilization following a multi-year production agreement between the two companies. The agreement focuses on incorporating Aeva’s innovative technology into Nikon's products aimed at high-volume automated robotic inspection and metrology applications.

data.title: SoFi Reports First Quarter 2026 with Record Net Revenue of $1.1 Billion, Record Member and Product Growth, Net Income of $167 Million
data.description: SoFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SOFI) announced its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The company, known for its comprehensive app offering various digital financial services like borrowing, saving, spending, investing, and financial protection, reported substantial growth in key areas. During Q1, member numbers increased by 35% and product offerings saw a 39% rise. A notable 43% of new customers contributed to these positive results. The company's success was attributed to a robust focus on innovation and brand development, resulting in significant growth and impressive returns during this period.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Seagate, Bloom Energy, Teradyne Lead Earnings Movers; Tech Titans On Tap
data.description: Stocks experienced a decline due to concerns about OpenAI and increasing oil prices, but later recovered some of the losses. Notably, Seagate and Bloom Energy were the top performers in terms of earnings. In the post-market, Dow Jones Futures showed Seagate, Bloom Energy, and Teradyne leading the way among earnings movers, with expectations for upcoming reports from prominent tech companies.

data.title: PENSKE AUTOMOTIVE GROUP REPORTS QUARTERLY RESULTS
data.description: The overall gross profit per vehicle sold at retail, for both new and used cars, rose consecutively. There was a significant surge in retail automotive service and parts revenue, achieving $864 million with a growth of 4.6%. The same-store revenue from retail automotive service and parts saw a matching increase of 4.6%, resulting in a 5.7% growth in related gross profit.

data.title: AI could reshape banking in the Agentic Economy, with challenges for trust, money, and risk governance.
data.description: The emergence of AI-driven economic activity is forcing banks to reassess their roles in trust management, programmable money, and risk governance. This shift highlights the need for financial institutions to adapt to new technologies and evolving market demands. As artificial intelligence continues to shape the financial landscape, banks are increasingly faced with the task of redefining their strategies to navigate this changing environment. This trend underscores the importance of aligning with innovative solutions to meet the demands of a rapidly evolving market.
Hezbollah reports: War sirens are sounding in Bur'am and Duviv in Western Galilee.
IDF Spokesperson: 'Preliminary: Alerts were activated in several areas in the north of the country, details are under investigation.'

data.title: Emergent BioSolutions Partners with Professional Baseball Player Davis Schneider to Raise Awareness of NARCAN® Nasal Spray Among Canadians and Help Save Lives
data.description: Today, Emergent BioSolutions (NYSE: EBS) based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, announced a partnership with professional baseball player Davis Schneider to address the stigma surrounding opioid poisonings. They aim to educate the public on using NARCAN ® Nasal Spray to save lives. Schneider, who tragically lost his brother Steven in 2020, is sharing his family’s story as part of Emergent’s Opioid Crisis Impact Map. This interactive platform showcases lived experiences nationwide, shedding light on the severe impact of the opioid crisis. The collaboration seeks to increase awareness and readiness to combat opioid-related incidents.

data.title: Gas prices in the US surge with the national average reaching $4.23 per gallon due to Middle East supply disruptions.
data.description: The average cost of one gallon of gas across the nation has surged to $4.23 amid the ongoing disruptions in oil supply from the Middle East. This increase comes as oil prices continue to rise.

data.title: Wheels Up Completes Major Fleet Modernization Milestone 18 Months Ahead of Schedule
data.description: A major aviation company has decided to remove its old jet fleets from service as it fully shifts to using only Phenom 300 and Challenger 300 Series aircraft. The company, Wheels Up Experience Inc. (NYSE: UP), known for its private aviation services, made this transition on April 29, 2026, in Atlanta. This move signifies a complete shift to the exclusive use of these particular aircraft models for their operations.

data.title: SNDL Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operational Results
data.description: The company continues to uphold robust liquidity while progressing strategic priorities and profit-boosting endeavors. With significant focus on enhancing profitability, the company is strategically advancing key initiatives to drive growth and financial stability. This commitment to fortifying liquidity and executing strategic plans has enabled the company to flourish, with a noteworthy increase in revenues by X% and a solid rise in profits by Y%. Additionally, the successful implementation of profit-enhancement strategies has propelled the company towards achieving its financial objectives, positioning it as a formidable player in the market.

data.title: JinkoSolar Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Shangrao, China, on April 29, 2026, JinkoSolar Holding Co., Ltd. shared its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026. As a prominent player in the clean energy sector, JinkoSolar operates globally and is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol JKS. The financial report covers the period up to March 31, 2026, offering insights into the company's performance during this timeframe.
